tests.name: Reviews staged Java files
tests.description: Should read and analyze all staged .java files

tests.name: Detects concurrency violations (shared mutable state)
tests.description: Should flag CRITICAL when mutable field accessed without synchronization

tests.name: Detects safety violations (unchecked nulls)
tests.description: Should flag WARNING when nullable value used without null check

tests.name: Triggers java-security-audit for security-critical code
tests.description: Should invoke java-security-audit when security packages detected

tests.name: Reports findings by severity (CRITICAL/WARNING/NOTE)
tests.description: Should categorize findings as CRITICAL, WARNING, or NOTE

tests.name: Blocks commit on CRITICAL findings
tests.description: Should prevent commit when CRITICAL issues detected

tests.name: Applies code-review-principles universally
tests.description: Should check against universal principles (DRY, KISS, YAGNI)
